message:
fix(buffer): add missing Buffer instance methods and fix native/JS cooperation

- Add missing Buffer instance methods to runtime.js: copy, equals, compare,
  indexOf, includes, byteLength, toJSON, and all read/write Int32/UInt32/
  UInt16/Float/Double methods
- Change native Zig Buffer to not override globalThis.Buffer - the JS Buffer
  class handles the full implementation with prototype methods
- Native helpers now registered in _modules._nativeBuffer for future optimization
